profiles.name: Celebi RBY UMB
profiles.description: F-drive Celebi Red/Blue Ultra Minimum Battles review-first workflow using the same Gen 1 RBY UMB orchestrator stages.

paths.final_manifest: {codex_dir}/Celebi RBY UMB CODEx orchestrator final base_manifest.json

tools.title: Profile Pipeline Stage
tools.description: Runs a project/profile-selected pipeline script with a stage argument. Profiles choose the concrete script through {pipeline_script}.

tools.title: Profile Pipeline Stage Strict
tools.description: Runs a project/profile-selected pipeline stage with --strict.

tools.title: Member Carousel Finder
tools.description: Finds the member carousel start marker through the orchestrator visual LLM step.

tools.title: LLM Dispatch
tools.description: Writes an orchestrator LLM packet, dispatches it through Codex/Code, and verifies the expected feedback artifact.

tools.title: Run Auto-Editor
tools.description: Runs auto-editor with the current project/profile settings and writes the raw FCPXML used by review-base workflows.

tools.title: FCPXML Segment Review Prepare
tools.description: Parses an FCPXML into reviewable source-backed segments, or writes a pending artifact when the FCPXML is not available yet.

tools.title: Dump Timeline Clips
tools.description: Dumps current Resolve timeline video clips to JSON for waveform and cut review.

tools.title: Transcribe Audio
tools.description: Runs faster-whisper transcription through the project transcription script.

tools.title: Waveform QA
tools.description: Classifies timeline clips for possible audio-artifact review.

tools.title: HTML Cut Review
tools.description: Builds the browser waveform review surface.

tools.title: Apply Native Cut Review Decisions
tools.description: Applies saved HTML review decisions to the current Resolve review spine.

tools.title: Minimum Battles Detector
tools.description: Classifies whether the video is a Minimum Battles Series for intro-speed/tooling selection.

tools.title: Detect Battles
tools.description: Runs the orchestrator LLM battle-detection step.

tools.title: Insert Battle Gaps FCPXML
tools.description: Inserts battle gaps through FCPXML rewrite.

tools.title: Classify Battles
tools.description: Classifies detected battles as rival, gym, or other through orchestrator LLM dispatch.

tools.title: Classify Rival Starter
tools.description: Determines rival starter/location metadata for Gen 2 intro assets.

tools.title: Place Battle Intro Overlays
tools.description: Places rival/gym leader intro overlays on V2.

tools.title: Place Gen 1 Leader Intros
tools.description: Inserts discrete 2x Gen 1 leader intro clips.

tools.title: Import Shared Assets
tools.description: Imports configured shared Pokemon assets.

tools.title: Import Game Assets
tools.description: Imports game-specific assets.

tools.title: Insert Intro Outro
tools.description: Builds an edited timeline with intro/outro assets.

tools.title: Place Intro BGM
tools.description: Places the project intro/general BGM starter track.

tools.title: Place Battle BGM
tools.description: Places general BGM segments around battle ranges.

tools.title: Place Battle Audio
tools.description: Places rival/gym/other battle audio by battle type.

tools.title: Apply Audio Fades
tools.description: Applies prerendered constant-power fades at BGM/battle boundaries.

tools.title: Layout Member Carousel
tools.description: Applies member-carousel crop/underlay layout.

tools.title: Apply Fairlight Preset
tools.description: Installs/applies the project Fairlight preset.

tools.title: Render Timeline
tools.description: Queues and starts a Resolve render preset.

workflows.name: Gen 1 RBY UMB Review-First Edit
workflows.description: Build review artifacts offline, pause for human approval, compile source-time decisions, then launch Resolve once for final assembly with cuts, visual holds, Gen 1 leader intros, BGM, carousel, and validation-ready structure.

review_surfaces.title: FCPXML Segment Review
review_surfaces.description: Table review of source-backed FCPXML video segments. Decisions are keep, cut, or manual_fit.

steps.title: Run waveform, n-gram, and artifact detectors
Review FCPXML sections for cut/manual-fit decisions
Apply waveform review decisions to review spine

workflows.name: IRL / General Video Review-First Edit
workflows.description: A-roll/story-first workflow for IRL or general videos: dump timeline clips, transcribe, build waveform and LLM review packets, apply approved review cuts, then Fairlight and render.

review_surfaces.title: FCPXML Segment Review
review_surfaces.description: Source-backed FCPXML section review for full-section cuts or manual-fit sections.

workflows.name: Pokemon Gym Leader Challenge Edit
workflows.description: Standard Pokemon challenge workflow for Crystal/GSC-style gym leader videos: intro/outro assets, battle detection/gaps, rival/gym intro overlays, BGM/battle audio, carousel, Fairlight, and render.

steps.title: Classify challenge format for intro speed

llm_tasks.title: IRL Narrative Cut Review
llm_tasks.why_llm: IRL/story videos need semantic judgment for false starts, duplicated takes, abandoned tangents, and edit notes while preserving natural conversational cadence and story context.

llm_tasks.title: Narrative Cut Review
llm_tasks.why_llm: False starts, abandoned explanations, stale takes, and self-corrections require transcript-level semantic judgment before deterministic cut application.

llm_tasks.title: Minimum Battles Classifier
llm_tasks.why_llm: Challenge format is inferred from transcript intent and repeated trainer attempts, not a single deterministic marker.

llm_tasks.title: First-Time Trainer Battle Detection
llm_tasks.why_llm: The battle-start detector needs transcript context to distinguish actual first-time trainer battles from casual mentions, retries, and summary narration.

llm_tasks.title: Battle Type Classification
llm_tasks.why_llm: Rival, gym, Elite Four, champion, and ordinary battles are inferred from team composition and surrounding challenge context.

llm_tasks.title: Rival Starter Classification
llm_tasks.why_llm: Rival starter and location depend on battle team composition and game-version rules that are easier to verify semantically than through filename heuristics.

llm_tasks.title: Battle End Refinement
llm_tasks.why_llm: The exact battle-end frame is a visual state transition that varies by win/give-up and is best resolved from sampled frame images.

llm_tasks.title: Member Carousel Detection
llm_tasks.why_llm: Carousel start is identified by a visual overlay style after the last battle, not by transcript text or timeline metadata.

llm_tasks.title: BGM Library Classification
llm_tasks.why_llm: BGM intent comes from filenames and project conventions before audio-feature analysis verifies the tags.
